title: Deepslatemon
description: A fabric cobblemon modpack for Deepslatemon, a cobblemon server. Whith performance mods, shaders and more !!! made by X_DARK_LS and bolcotcot, us, every us and us. But not US.
body:
A cobblemon modpack featuring various mods, especially client side mods but also non-client side mods (only two at the time I am writing this). The client side mods are mainly performance mods and quality of life mods and the server side mods are cobblemon (obviously) and exposure (a survival friendly camera mod)

I made this modpack for a server of the same name. (Deepslatemon is a revive from Pokecap wish is a server that I made to play with my friends, you can still download the modpack but you will not be able to join the server because it's private and there is a whitelist)

Cobblemon is a mod that adds pokemon into minecraft

bolcotcot, X_DARK_LS
